_comment: Dungeon types per biome for level/POI naming and placement. Keys match EBiomeType (HomeWorldPlanetoidTypes.h). Per docs/PLANETOID_BIOMES.md §2 and §4. Expand with additional dungeon variants per biome in later lists.

Desert.notes: Desert tomb or crypt; level/POI naming

Forest.notes: Grove or dark wood dungeon; level/POI naming

Marsh.notes: Swamp or bog shrine; level/POI naming
